title: Scan to PDF — Convert Camera Shots Offline
h1: Convert Photos and Scans to PDF Locally
description: Turn photos of documents taken with your camera into clean PDFs entirely in your browser. No upload. 100% secure local processing.

sections.title: Why Use Scan-to-PDF Offline?
sections.content: Photos of documents contain sensitive information. Process them locally without any cloud access.

sections.title: How to Convert Scans to PDF

steps.title: Import Photos
steps.description: Select photos taken with your phone or camera.

steps.title: Export PDF
steps.description: Download a clean, professional-looking scanned PDF.

sections.title: 100% Secure Local Processing
sections.content: All operations are performed directly on your local device. We use advanced WebAssembly technology to process your documents without ever uploading them to external servers, ensuring complete privacy.

sections.title: Scanned Documents Stay on Device
sections.content: Invoices, contracts, and ID scans processed entirely in browser memory without any server access.

sections.title: Convert Scans in Real Time
sections.content: Photo enhancement and PDF generation happens in milliseconds, even for high-resolution camera shots.

faqs.a: JPG, PNG, WebP, and HEIC from modern cameras.
